Bob Dylan
July 27, 1991
Darien Center, NY
Lakeside Amphitheater at Darien Lake

Maggie's Farm
Shelter From The Storm

Trail Of The Buffalo

Don't Think Twice, It's All Right
Boots Of Spanish Leather
